title: Splattercraft
description: Fork of Splatcraft that adds more Splatoon content to Minecraft
body: # Splattercraft This mod is a fork of [Splatcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/splatcraft), updated to 1.20.1 and has more features. ## Additional Features: - Special weapons: - Inkzooka - Ink armor - Bomb rush - Inkstrike - Triple Inkstrike - Weapon kits: Press G(default) in-game while holding a weapon to open the kit menu! You can set the weapon's sub and special weapon! Use your sub weapon by left-clicking, and your special weapon by middle-clicking - Whitelist: Limit players who can use this mod's features! (/inkwhitelist) (Requires splatcraft:inkAbilityWhitelist to be set to true) - Matches: - `/match start turf/zones` — auto-assigns players on stage to teams by ink color and starts a match - `/match stop ` — stops an active match by stage name - Match Types: - Turf War - Splat Zones - Requires you to set up zones with the Zone Marker (Right click corner A and B inside a stage, then right click the air to save the zone. With a new marker, shift-right click to switch to remove mode, then right click zones to remove them) - Death Recap: - New gamerule: `splatcraft:deathRecap` (default: false) - Cinematic death screen spectating your killer with auto-respawn in 5 seconds - Other tweaks: All weapon recipies are unlocked by default, ingredients are added to vanilla loot tables
